title: ELYSIUM SPA Natural Eucalyptus Epsom Salts, White, 450 g (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

THERAPEUTIC BATH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with eucalyptus essential oil

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 450g
description: From the manufacturer Therapeutic Bath Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in Epsom salts, it will soothe muscle aches, relax the body and improve circulation. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins. Restful sleep Adding Epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep. Relax and recover from an active lifestyle with Elysium Spa Epsom Salts.
